discrepancy_analysis: CONCORDANT: Model result 5/54 (9.26%) matches reported 9% NF2 from Fig 2b oncoprint within the 10% relative tolerance (relative difference approximately 2.9%). Verified by loading MOESM5 (Supplementary Table 2) WES MAF: 5 unique samples (Tumor_1543 Splice_Site, Tumor_1682 Nonsense, Tumor_1856 Missense, Tumor_1890 In_Frame_Del, Tumor_2179 Nonsense) harbor NF2 mutations. Using N=54 WES cohort denominator as reported in Fig 2b: 5/54 = 9.26%, which rounds to 9% as shown in the paper.
